sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71812" key="cunoxarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξῡνο-χᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n71812.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">rejoicing with all alike,</tr_> of Apollo, ibid.</sense> </entryFree>
